activation_large.description: Un-oriented partners within 10mi of large priority markets (>300 shifts)

activation_medium.description: Un-oriented partners within 15mi of specific medium markets

activation_small.description: Un-oriented partners with variable radius in small markets

incomplete_orientation.description: Partners who started remote orientation (2-6 of 7 modules) but didn't finish

referral_low_dl.description: Recent OPs in low-DL priority markets with referral bonus context

patterns.description: partners who downloaded but haven't oriented
patterns.notes: Use small markets query — covers broadest scope with variable radius

patterns.description: partners who stalled in remote orientation
partners who passed orientation but no shift
patterns.notes: Referral query finds recent OPs — closest match for post-OP no shift

patterns.description: new downloads in a specific market
patterns.notes: Can filter results by market after query runs
